loadedTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the page was loaded

httpStatusCode.description: HTTP response status code (currently always 200; see SPEC)

depth.description: Link distance from a start URL (0 for start URLs)

referrerUrl.description: The linking page URL, or null for start URLs

hash.description: MD5 hex digest of the content

bytes.description: UTF-8 byte length of the content

content.description: Inline content string. Present when saveDestination includes "dataset".

key.description: Key-value store key. Present when the content is stored in the key-value store.

url.description: Public URL to the key-value store item. Present when stored to a public store.

original.description: The raw page HTML. "hash" and "bytes" are always present. When "original" is in save, the raw HTML is included as "content" (saving to the dataset) or referenced by "key"/"url" (stored in the key-value store).

hash.description: MD5 hex digest of the content

bytes.description: UTF-8 byte length of the content

content.description: Inline content string. Present when saveDestination includes "dataset".

key.description: Key-value store key. Present when the content is stored in the key-value store.

url.description: Public URL to the key-value store item. Present when stored to a public store.

txt.description: Extracted plain text. Present when "txt" is in save.

hash.description: MD5 hex digest of the content

bytes.description: UTF-8 byte length of the content

content.description: Inline content string. Present when saveDestination includes "dataset".

key.description: Key-value store key. Present when the content is stored in the key-value store.

url.description: Public URL to the key-value store item. Present when stored to a public store.

markdown.description: Extracted Markdown. Present when "markdown" is in save.

hash.description: MD5 hex digest of the content

bytes.description: UTF-8 byte length of the content

content.description: Inline content string. Present when saveDestination includes "dataset".

key.description: Key-value store key. Present when the content is stored in the key-value store.

url.description: Public URL to the key-value store item. Present when stored to a public store.

json.description: Extracted structured JSON. Present when "json" is in save.

hash.description: MD5 hex digest of the content

bytes.description: UTF-8 byte length of the content

content.description: Inline content string. Present when saveDestination includes "dataset".

key.description: Key-value store key. Present when the content is stored in the key-value store.

url.description: Public URL to the key-value store item. Present when stored to a public store.

html.description: Cleaned extracted HTML. Present when "html" is in save.

errors.description: Error messages from the final attempt

retryCount.description: Number of retries before the request was abandoned

crawledTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the failed request was abandoned
